excerpt: Provisioned Throughput gives you reserved inference capacity for frontier open models like MiniMax M3 and GLM-5.2. Token-based pricing, a 99% uptime SLA, and up to 90% lower cost than proprietary APIs. No GPU-hour math, no infrastructure to manage.

title: Open, convenient and predictable: Introducing Provisioned Throughput
